title: Beyond political overwriting: The case for neutral nomenclature for National Law Universities
description: The recent decision by the Academic Council of the Rajiv Gandhi National University of Law (RGNUL), Punjab, to propose the removal of former Prime Minister Rajiv Gandhi’s name from the University’s title has sparked an intense debate. The request to rename the institution as “National Law University, Punjab” has been submitted to the Executive Council and the Punjab government for final approval.Political factions have predictably positioned themselves to either oppose the action as a divisive “
